starter_intents.title: French Quarter Walking Tour
starter_intents.description: Explore the historic heart of New Orleans with local guides.

starter_intents.title: Garden District Tour
starter_intents.description: Stroll past antebellum mansions and oak-lined streets.

starter_intents.title: Swamp Airboat Tour
starter_intents.description: See alligators and wetlands outside the city.

starter_intents.title: Ghost / Voodoo / Vampire Tour
starter_intents.description: Night tours through haunted French Quarter legends.

starter_intents.title: Food & Cocktail Tour
starter_intents.description: Taste gumbo, beignets, pralines, and cocktails.
